description: AEL core operating rules — always active, independent of board/test history
rules: AI executes all software actions: commands, file writes, device probing, flashing, serial reads
User only performs physical-world actions: plug/unplug cables, press buttons, change wiring, power cycle hardware
Never instruct the user to type or run a command — run it yourself
Before assuming board or port state, probe it: udevadm, dmesg, ls /dev/tty*, device enumeration
A PASS result only proves what was actually measured — always verify routing and port assignment, not just outcome
